items.title: RT by @WhiteHouse: 17 years ago, Democrat leaders started closing coal, nuclear and gas plants and instead bet on wind and solar. The result was higher prices and no meaningful growth in electricity production. Fortunately, the Working Families Tax Cut ended new wind and solar subsidies on July 4.
items.summary:
17 years ago, Democrat leaders started closing coal, nuclear and gas plants and instead bet on wind and solar. The result was higher prices and no meaningful growth in electricity production.

Fortunately, the Working Families Tax Cut ended new wind and solar subsidies on July 4.

Video

items.title: NATO Agrees to $50 Billion in Defense Deals to Placate Trump
items.summary: NATO allies have agreed to at least $50 billion in defense industry deals to show US President Donald Trump that Europe is heeding his spending demands. Melinda Haring, nonresident senior fellow at the Atlantic Council, joined Balance of Power to discuss this as well as the war in Ukraine. She said Ukraine's strategy to compel Russian President Vladimir Putin to the negotiating table is working. (

items.title: We signed a Drone Deal agreement with Denmark. This is already Ukraine’s ninth such agreement, and it is important that more and more partners are joining this format, which opens up greater opportunities for joint defense production, the exchange of expertise, and transparency in weapons exports. Together, we are building a new security architecture. I thank Denmark, and personally Mette, for this step toward strengthening our shared defense. It was with Denmark that we began joint production in Ukraine under the Danish model, and it is absolutely fair that Denmark will now have access to Ukrainian exports of weapons tested in war. Today, we also discussed with the Prime Minister @Statsmin the strengthening of our air defense and work on European anti-ballistic defense. It is extremely important for us right now to receive Patriot missiles as quickly as possible and to jointly develop our own European capabilities to counter ballistic threats. I thank Denmark for its continued support for our people – for its defense and financial assistance, and for all its contributions to the PURL initiative.
items.summary: We signed a Drone Deal agreement with Denmark. items.title: We value Germany's leadership in strengthening our air defense through bilateral support and substantial contributions to the PURL initiative. Thanks to this, we are able to procure anti-ballistic missiles that are in short supply. This is especially important now, as Russia is counting on brutal ballistic strikes to enable it to continue the war. We are also preparing a Drone Deal with Germany and working to establish a joint European anti-ballistic system. I am grateful to Germany, and personally to @bundeskanzler Friedrich Merz, for the support and for the steps being taken toward European anti-ballistic defense. This is the only way to guarantee reliable protection of lives across Europe from missile threats.
items.summary:

items.title: Alibaba Larang Karyawan Gunakan Claude Code Anthropic di Tengah Memanasnya Tech War AS - Tiongkok

I believe Europe urgently needs its own capability to produce anti-ballistic systems and the missiles they require. We all value the Patriot system. It is an excellent system. There are others as well. But today’s wars have shown that current Patriot production is not enough to meet the growing demand for protection against ballistic missiles.That is a fact. And we must respond to that fact. Those who defend life need more Patriots. We have also discussed Patriot production licenses with our American partners. I ask you to support our efforts to make this happen. From a speech at the NATO Defense Industry Forum. (5/5)

items.title: R to @ZelenskyyUa: Зустрівся з Генеральним секретарем НАТО в Анкарі. Дякую Марку Рютте за особисту підтримку та допомогу Україні й нашому народу. Поінформував Марка про наслідки російських атак на українські міста й громади. Обговорили захист наших людей від російської балістики та необхідність термінових поставок ракет до систем ППО. Окремо говорили про додаткові внески країн Альянсу у програму PURL та зусилля для створення антибалістичної коаліції. Обговорили і спільне виробництво зброї та посилення оборонної співпраці між Україною та країнами НАТО. Зараз дуже важливо, щоб усі канали підтримки нашого захисту неба – як двосторонні, так і багатосторонні – працювали максимально активно. Марк відзначив успіхи наших воїнів на фронті, які завдають Росії великих втрат, а також результати наших далекобійних відповідей. Домовились оперативно співпрацювати, щоб реалізувати все, про що говорили під час зустрічі.
items.summary:
Зустрівся з Генеральним секретарем НАТО в Анкарі. Дякую Марку Рютте за особисту підтримку та допомогу Україні й нашому народу.

items.title: A substantive meeting with @MinPres. Thank you, Rob, for all your support for our people and your readiness to work together on solutions that will help protect lives. Without a doubt, Europe needs its own anti-ballistic capabilities so that the European way of life can be fully protected. We discussed what has already been accomplished together with our partners in this regard. The Prime Minister and I also signed a full-fledged drone cooperation agreement – a Drone Deal. It will create even more opportunities for joint production and technological development, and, most importantly, bring greater consistency to the exchange of expertise and the export of weapons. I am grateful to the Netherlands for the assistance that has helped protect and support thousands upon thousands of our people's lives from Russian strikes.
items.summary:

Without a doubt, Europe needs its own anti-ballistic capabilities so that the European way of life can be fully protected. We discussed what has already been accomplished together with our partners in this regard.
